name: bilibili
description: Design videos for cultural resonance on Bilibili. Analyze danmu psychology, meme triggers, collective reaction points, and community-native emotional beats.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.danmu_analysis: Identify likely collective comment triggers and danmu moments
capabilities.resonance_design: Design emotional and meme-based reaction architecture for Bilibili videos
capabilities.script_optimization: Improve scripts for stronger crowd response and repeatable moments
capabilities.community_alignment: Evaluate whether a video feels Bilibili-native or cross-platform generic
